titleStmt.title: SII 9.424: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 424. (A.R. No. 418 of 1928.) ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1323, Vishu, Vaiśākha, ba. 5, Sō[ma*]vāra, corresponding to A.D. 1401 May 2 Monday, in the reign of Harihara-Mahārāya. It records that, when Basavaṇṇa-Oḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya under the orders of the king, a gift of land was made by Tuḷuvaka-Heggaḍiti for the service of the god Tuḷuvēśvara and for feeding nine Brāhmans in the sattra of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara
cāravē trayilōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya staṁbhavē . svasti śrīja
yābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1323 saṁdu vartamāna viśusaṁvatsarada vayiśākha ba 5
sōmavāradalu svasti śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa hari
haramāharāyaru vijayanagariyalu sukhadiṁ sāṁbrājyavanāḷuta
(ṁ) viralu Ā rāyara nirupadiṁ basavaṁṇaOḍeyaru bārakūra rājyava sa
ddhar(ṁ)madiṁ pratipālaneya māḍutaṁvidda kāladalu basarūra paḍuva
kēriya Oḷagaṇa jaraḍeya baḷiya kōṭīsaradahana moṁmagaḷu tuḷu
vakaheggaḍiti māḍida dharmachatrada silāsāsanada kramaveṁteṁdaḍe madu
ruva hadi Oḷage dharmake biṭa bāḷina vivara Oḷamāḍina Oḷage muḍalu
gōgiya baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu toḷahara baḷi
yavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu haravariya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu baḍagalu baḷagāra baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu �yo catusī
meya Oḷage Uḷa mane maneṭhāu bituva bāḷu nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 21
yī bāḷiṁge gēṇi nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 60 mūḍalu Āriya baḷiya
vara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gojaraḍeya baḷiya dēvaruseṭi
ya gaḍiyiṁ Āraya baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁ toḷahara baḷiyavara ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ harida baccaliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu toḷahara baḷiyava
ra gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu Āciseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ dēvasvada ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ Uḍuvara baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu �yo catussīmeya
Oḷage Uḷa naḍutāṟa bāḷu bittuva bede gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu
muḍe 26 kaṁ gēṇi nāgaṁḍugadalu bhatta mūḍe 65 cippaḷiya O
ḷage mūḍalu jalleya Aṇniseṭiya hiriya gaddeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu heggaḍitiya mūlada javaḷiya tāṟagaḍiyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍagalu paḍuvalu Āllāḷaseṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍa
galu dēvaruseṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu �yo catussīme
ya Oḷage Uḷa bāḷa bittuva bede gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugada
lu muḍe 7 kaṁ gēṇi nāgaṁḍugadalu bhattamuḍe 30 mērāḍi
ya Oḷage tuḷuvaheggaḍiti tābada mūlada bāḷina vivarakiṁgitada
harakōṭiseṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu Āriya baḷiyavara gaḍiyi
ṁ paḍuvalu selaṭiya bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu dēvasvada gaḍiyiṁ mu
ḍalu ciṁmaṇaseṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu mattaṁ maki meke
maneya bāgila gadeyiṁdaṁ kisukāḍahana tāṟu bituva bede
gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 106 yī bāḷiṁge gēṇi nāgaṁ
ḍugada bhata mūḍe 30 mērāḍiya Oḷage malahara beṁmaṇana ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu kaḷiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu selaṭiya bāḷiṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu Āriya baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīme
ya Oḷage Oḷa bāḷu bittuva bede gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mu
ḍe 12 hane 20 kaṁ gēṇi nāgaṁḍugadalu bhate mūḍe 30 �yo bāḷi
ṁge Āruvārake koṭa Ātta kaṭiga 450 �yo bāḷiṁge maṭāruva haṭi
yalu teṟava teṟu kaṭiga 482 hoṁnabaḷiya bhata nāgaṁḍugadalu mū
ḍe 4 hane 10 tuḷuvēśvaradēvarige teṟuva bhatta mūgaṁḍugadalu muḍe
14 muḷaladēvige teṟuva bhatta mugaṁḍugadalu muḍe 8 heggaḍiti
ya mūlada dēvara kēriya nālvaḍikeya jananavanu dēvara naṁdābeḷaki
ge koṭadu Ānegaḷiya Oḷagaṇa kaḷiṁjiya hiriya maneya kaḷu tu
ḷuvaheggaḍitige yirisida Aruvārada bāḷina vivara mūḍalu koḷaci
ya tāṟiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hiriya maneya kaḷagaḍiyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍagalu paḍuvalu Āgaraḍa kaṁṭhaṁdiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu mūḍakareya ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu �yo catusīmeya Oḷage Oḷa mane maneṭāu mekki
mara nekku nidi sahitavāgi bāḷu bittuva bede gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu
mūḍe 8 kaṁ gēṇi nāgaṁḍugadalu bhatta mūḍe 32 �yo bāḷiṁge Ūra Oḍe
yana hadiyalu manebhāgadalu teṟuva teṟu kāṭiga 482 �yo bāḷiṁ
ge koṭa Arddha kāṭi ga 145 �yo bāḷina Ārddha baṁdaru dharmake vritti baṁdaru
dharmake mērāḍiya ci(ṁ)mmaṇaseṭiya hiryya hittiliṁdaṁ muḍalu
makki hane 50 Ajirāvutana hittiliṁda naṁdābeḷakige ga 3 haggaḍiti mā
ḍida dharma Amrutapaḍige Aki hane 1 Oṁdu naṁdābeḷaku Oṁbhatu maṁdi
brāhmarige chatra �yo dharmavanu mākaṁṇaseṭi hosabuseṭi kōṭiyaṁṇa
seṭi sōvaṁṇaseṭi �yo nālvaru Obatāya makaḷu Aḍake mākaṁṇaseṭi naḍsuva A
ḍuva dugaṇa Adaha naḍavava Avaru naḍsadidare Avara kuṭuṁba naḍsuvaru Alaha
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdhara . ṣaṣṭhirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.424 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
